snippet.sync_client:
from seed import SeedApi

client = SeedApi(
    token="YOUR_TOKEN",
)
client.items.list_items()
snippet.async_client:
import asyncio

from seed import AsyncSeedApi

client = AsyncSeedApi(
    token="YOUR_TOKEN",
)


async def main() -> None:
    await client.items.list_items()


asyncio.run(main())

snippet.async_client:
import asyncio

from seed import AsyncSeedApi

client = AsyncSeedApi(
    token="YOUR_TOKEN",
)


async def main() -> None:
    await client.auth.gettoken(
        client_id="client_id",
        client_secret="client_secret",
    )


asyncio.run(main())

from seed import SeedApi

client = SeedApi(
    token="YOUR_TOKEN",
)
client.files.upload(
    name="name",
    parent_id="parent_id",
)
snippet.async_client:
import asyncio

from seed import AsyncSeedApi

client = AsyncSeedApi(
    token="YOUR_TOKEN",
)


async def main() -> None:
    await client.files.upload(
        name="name",
        parent_id="parent_id",
    )


asyncio.run(main())
